achievements.title: Yep, You Guessed It, a Note to Players
achievements.description: Easy difficulty is not allowed, and feel free to attempt the whole set on Nightmare if you want
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Good Luck? Not With Adol Around
achievements.description: Help a flower girl out, put some gold into this economy!
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Busted in the Busting Square
achievements.description: Get arrested near the start of your adventure, then receive a request from Kiemarl
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: When in Altago, Fight Like the Altaginians Do
achievements.description: It's a new land, better take the time to learn how to fight the dangerous beasts that live here
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Guard-en Full of Destructive Defense
achievements.description: Successfully perform ten Flash Guards by pressing L+R right before an enemy attacks you, a technique not gone over in the tutorial, in a single session without returning to the title screen
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Simple Chests as Plain as Day
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in Altago Plains: Northeast and Shrine of Origins
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Heed Our Call...
achievements.description: Defeat the Two-Headed Turtle "Val Klar" in the Shrine of Origins and obtain the Moon Seal
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Val-i-Klar, the Ashen Turtle!
achievements.description: Defeat Val Klar without getting hurt
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Get Well Gift of Concern
achievements.description: After Adol's swift recovery, receive a Nadly Flower from Maya and learn about it from Tia without leaving the screen after obtaining the flower
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Judge of Characters, but not Letters
achievements.description: Obtain a letter from King Kiemarl and meet a mysterious girl soon after
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Messengers Red-Hair and Rocks-for-Brains
achievements.description: Defeat the Long-Tusked Boar "Es Gallion" in Shannoa Forest to get back your stolen letter
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Boring a Hole in This Boar
achievements.description: Defeat Es Gallion with everyone at or below level 6, only weapons equipped, and without healing
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Clash of Elk Energy and Dragon Energy
achievements.description: Have Elk join your party after meeting Eldress Fatima regarding the Ancient Tree Altar
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Smashing Boulders, and Wrecking Ecosystems
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in Altago Plains: East and Southeast, and in Shannoa Forest
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Legend of Boots: Trails in the Trees
achievements.description: Obtain the Diamond Boot in the Ancient Tree, allowing you to break deadly thorns!
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Becoming the Treasure Bugs That We Are
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in Ancient Tree: Outside and Ancient Tree, besides the White Talisman
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Titano Monsters Bug Me and My Village Too Much
achievements.description: Defeat the Big Bug Beast "Zeran Fith" in the Ancient Tree
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Nothing Holding You Down, Not Even Oversized Bugs
achievements.description: Defeat Zeran Fith without anyone getting the heavy status or having the Silver Feather equipped
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Ability Downloads Via Earth Altars
achievements.description: Obtain the Earth Seal and report your findings to Eldress Fatima before parting with Elk
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Flower Girl Guardian Escorts the Plains
achievements.description: The world is dangerous these days, make sure Tia makes it back to Altago City safely from the plains
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: By Who's Hand Has it Once Again Been Given Flesh?
achievements.description: Seems one of the maids in Altago is getting a little batty about keeping the place clean, or she's a Belmont
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Sari not Sari on Joining the Group
achievements.description: A girl has forced herself onto your party... that's one way to bypass the city exit restrictions
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Keep Your Eyes and Hands Away From My Hair-itage
achievements.description: Get a Luminous Rock for free and have Aisha almost get recognized and worry for her hair
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Lumber Containers Ready to Mold
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in Altago Plains: Center, West, and Southwest, Altago Highlands, and in Cave Byway
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Ros Presents "The Joy of Club Swinging"
achievements.description: Defeat the Rock Monster "Ghilda Ros" in the Cave Byway while trekking towards Segram
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Bigger They Are, the Easier it is to Launch 'Em
achievements.description: Defeat Ghilda Ros in under 1  minute and 45 seconds (max level 15)
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: This is Your Brain, This is Your Brain on Walls
achievements.description: Wander a bit too much in the Segram Desert and find the Flame Shrine before entering Segram Village
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Went to Se-Grams of Loot, and Grains of Sand
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in Segram Desert (including outside the Flame Shrine)
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Monster With a Gentle Heart
achievements.description: Meet Cruxie and have Mustafa join your party to explore the Flame Shrine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Yes, I Stohl This Bird's Treasure
achievements.description: Defeat the Fire-Eater "Stohl Brahm" in the Fire Shrine, gaining access to the Ice Mist Crystal
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Carving Usually Comes After the Kill
achievements.description: Defeat Stohl Bram without losing your damage combo more than 3 times
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Burning Your Soles for Loot
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in the Flame Shrine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Guardian of the Reticent Lava
achievements.description: Defeat the Guardian "Levard Galem" in the Flame Shrine
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Hot-Blooded Gelaldy, Now Unrestrained
achievements.description: Defeat Levard Galem without letting him use his super attack
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Al-ta Places You Will Go
achievements.description: Obtain the Fire Seal and head back to Segram to learn of your next destination
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Family More Unstable Than Loose Sand
achievements.description: After going to the Flame Altar, check up on Cruxie and learn more about her, Mustafa, and Dreisen from the people of Segram, in one session without leaving the village
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Loot Altago Doesn't Want You to Find
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in the Old Waterway
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Adventurers in a Pinch for a Miracle Solution
achievements.description: Defeat the Deep-Earth Crab "Valisa Luti" in the Old Waterway and obtain a Scarlet Crystal
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Bobbing for Bubbles as You Bobble
achievements.description: Defeat Valisa Luti without getting hurt or losing your combo on Normal (you only need to meet one of these requirements on Hard and Nightmare)
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Sergeant of the Dragon Knights of Pluto's Near Encounter
achievements.description: After saving Maya for now, find Sigroon as she is continuing to search for Aisha
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: An Ern(e)st Rematch
achievements.description: Defeat Dark Mercenary "Geis" in Kylos Gorge: Northwest to remind him who is the stronger fighter
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Catastrophe Outside Canaan
achievements.description: Defeat Geis without using any skills, EXTRA, or healing
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Engorging on Tasty Spoils
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in Altago Plains: Gorge Way, and Kylos Gorge
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Woman of the Squalls
achievements.description: After reaching Kylos, meet Mishera and have her join your party
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Kingdom's Foundation Has Led to Separation
achievements.description: After Mishera joins you, have her meet Fatima, one of the other tribe elders
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Passive Roc's Cape
achievements.description: Obtain the Wind Cape in the Holy Precincts of Wind
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Treasure Glowing in Blustery Radiance
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in the Holy Precincts of Wind
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Cleansing of the Polluted Bird
achievements.description: Defeat Ferocious Bird "Kava Kelos" in the Holy Precincts of Wind, you made sure to defeat a Ptokeros in the fight... right?
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Surviving the Stench for Too Long
achievements.description: Defeat Kava Kelos without healing or having anyone get KOed
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Little Windsight Into Your Destination
achievements.description: Obtain the Wind Seal and learn from Mishera a little more about the Iska and Edona tribes
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Life Moves on When Altar Hunting
achievements.description: After your trip to Kylos and before heading to Ruins Island, check up on friends and other notable characters  in Altago City, Shannoa, and Segram, along with catching the Dragon Knights training
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Hesitation Before Sailing Away
achievements.description: Gain access to Ruins Island, you made sure to take care of any active sidequests you wanted to right?
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Start of a Ruins Life
achievements.description: Land on Ruins Island and have Geis join your party
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Blessings of a Foreign God
achievements.description: Obtain the Grattheos Talisman, allowing you to breath underwater
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Items That Lead a Life to Ruin
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in Ruins Island and Abandoned Town of Edona
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Not Enough Talismans for This Exorcism
achievements.description: Defeat the Demonic Octopus "Avari El" in Abandoned Town of Edona Village
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Tellah Tale About the Devilish Octomammoth
achievements.description: Defeat Avari El without anyone going below half health and without healing
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Bad Luck Ingrained on a Cell-ular Level
achievements.description: Obtain the Sea Seal and then try to leave Ruins Island
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Danger Lurking Around Every Turn, Got to Live and Learn
achievements.description: Defeat Ygses Toluga in the Colliseum and make your escape from Altago City
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Cornered Beast is More Dangerous Than a Trained One
achievements.description: Defeat Ygses Toluga without getting hurt or using EXTRA
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Happy Family, and a Grumpy Uncle, Start Their Second Quest
achievements.description: Meet Ciarius and finally get a few more party members available
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Word on Sanctum Boss Challenges!
achievements.description: Sanctum order: Earth -> Flame -> Wind. Do not enter Segram until Earth is cleared, and don't enter Moonlight Path until you clear Flame
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: No Sanctum for One's Reputation
achievements.description: Learn from Ciarius a little more about the Sanctums, and from some of the Iska Village residents about dragon power and Geis
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Stone That Paved the Way
achievements.description: After leaving Iska Village, reminisce and theorize with Geis at the Shrine of Orgin
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Wild Loot Found in Erness(t)
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in Wilderness
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Activating the Sig-Roons to Find her
achievements.description: Meet up with Sigroon and have her join your party
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Returning to the Roots of Our Treasure Horde
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in the Earth Sanctum and the chest outside the Ancient Tree past the deep water
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Stomping More Than a Sagiscellan of Scorching Fury
achievements.description: Defeat the Earth Dragon "Rada-Manj" in the Earth Sanctum and obtain the Earth Dragon Stone
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Big Moves Amid the Primitive Deep Leaves
achievements.description: Defeat Rada-Manj while you only use Skills that cost 35 or more SP to use (after SP cost reduction equipment), with Elk in the party, and no items
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Dragon-ing Our Feet Around, But Still Have Questions
achievements.description: After clearing the Earth Sanctum, speak with Eldress Fatima and see how Ciarius is doing with his research
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Blessing Yourself With Loot of the Burned Moats
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in the Flame Sanctum
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Vital Strength of Life in a World of Torment
achievements.description: Defeat the Flame Dragon "Angue-Barl" in the Flame Sanctum and obtain the Flame Dragon Stone
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Putting His Pain and Determination Into Every Swing
achievements.description: Defeat Angue-Barl without the Ice Mist Crystal, with Mustafa in the party, and no items
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Welcome to the Crew-xie
achievements.description: After clearing the Flame Sanctum, check back with Cruxie
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Opening Boxes Along the Lunar Route
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in the Moonlight Path
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Knocking Out the Knight's Lights
achievements.description: Defeat the Dragon Knights in Kylos Village
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Falling for Loot in Laputa More Than Any Sky Pirates
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in the Wind Sanctum
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: What, Bird Chariot Got Your Tongue?
achievements.description: Defeat Rio Farga in the Wind Sanctum on your way to the Wind Dragon
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Savoring the High Speed Ride
achievements.description: Defeat Rio Farga without losing your combo or using EXTRA skills
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Beast Creating Different Winds of Destruction
achievements.description: Defeat the Wind Dragon "Mu-Anti" in the Wind Sanctum and obtain the Wind Dragon Stone
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Upping the Anti on These Dragon Tests
achievements.description: Defeat Mu-Anti without anyone getting inflicted with curse/confuse/poison, with Mishera in the party, and no items
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The True History of Altago
achievements.description: After clearing the three sanctums, learn a little more about Iska's history, incuding about the Dual Blades
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Quick Run Away From Encampment
achievements.description: Open the chest at the Dragon Knight Encampment to find a Speed Orb
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Sinking Morale, and Sailing the Sea of Human Fear
achievements.description: When going though Altago City during the fog, find and help Geis defeat some monsters
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: See-As Who They Really Are
achievements.description: Find out the identity of the assassin, and their companion
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Stopping Me? The Truth is, You're Done!
achievements.description: Get the true assassin down to half health in the Throne Room fight
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Uncertainty in the Future From a Lost Method
achievements.description: Go around Altago City and checkup on those your friends helped, and how people are doing
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Better Hook Than Noltia Stone Shoes
achievements.description: Obtain the Steel Hooks in the Sea Sanctum for easier travel on ice
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Bunch of Shellfish Scavengers
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in the Sea Sanctum
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: O-Balon's Underwater Wonderworld
achievements.description: Defeat the Sea Dragon "O-Balon" in the Sea Sanctum and obtain the Sea Dragon Stone, did you defeat a Seah Damlin during this fight?
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Tranquility Found in Tranquil Waters
achievements.description: Defeat O-Balon without anyone getting KOed, with Aisha in the party, and no items
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Everyone Deserves a Pick Me Up, or a Picker Up
achievements.description: After obtaining the Sea Dragon Stone, check up on the elders in Altago City and Raud
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Learning of Your Rights for the Last Rite
achievements.description: Defeat the Moon Dragon "Ze-Kalios" in the Moon Sanctum, obtain the Moon Dragon Stone, and open up the Well of Souls
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Wall Crusher Proxy of the Proxy
achievements.description: Defeat Ze-Kalion without you using Skills that cost 25 SP or more (after SP cost reduction equipment), with Dogi in the party, and no items
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Feelings Welling Up in Our Souls
achievements.description: After the Well of Souls opens up, check on some familiar faces one final time
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Dragg Around What's Leth Behind
achievements.description: Defeat the Souls of the Fallen "Dragg Leth" in the Well of Souls
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Together They Stood. Together They Fell
achievements.description: Defeat the Dragg Leth while defeating the second one in 15 seconds or less after beating the first one
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Sole Solution for Souls on the Sole
achievements.description: Obtain the Moon Talisman to protect your feet from the winds of destruction
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Treasure Welling Up in Your Pockets
achievements.description: Open all of the chests in the Well of Souls
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Balancing Demise on a Blade
achievements.description: Defeat the Knight of Despair "Scias" in the Well of Souls. Welcome to the point of no return
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Death Throes After the Death Throne Room
achievements.description: Defeat Scias with Adol, Dogi, and Geis without having any of them equipped with any ultimate equpment, see comments for names
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: A Maiden the Abyss
achievements.description: Defeat the Maiden of Demise "Tialuna" in the Well of Souls
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Enlightening With Your Determination
achievements.description: Defeat Tialuna without defeating the Aud Leven support enemies
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: From An Effort of the Revival
achievements.description: Defeat Rul-Ende and save Altago from destruction
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Delivery From Tia Sidequest
achievements.description: Personally make the medicine delivery for Tia and receive a Dragon Energy Drop for your troubles
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Waters of Altago Sidequest
achievements.description: Help John Cordova out by bringing him various kinds of water
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Beautiful Flower Seeds Sidequest
achievements.description: Collect various kinds of seeds for Belinda Nis so she can make her own flower garden
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Jewel Collection Sidequest
achievements.description: Help out Teresa Runions by bringing her beautiful stones
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Lecture: Tribes of Altago Sidequest
achievements.description: Bring materials to Michael Wootton to learn more about the tribes of Altago
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Lecture: Titano Ecology Sidequest
achievements.description: Bring pieces of titanos to Michael Wootton to learn more about these monsters
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Byway of the Hunt Sidequest
achievements.description: Help Kevin Lassiter out by defeating Ghilda Ros in the Byway Cave
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: No Pole, Resilient Soul Sidequest
achievements.description: Help Chris Gouin get ready for more fishing by bringing him plenty of wood
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Forest Guardian Pilgrimage Sidequest
achievements.description: Help Carol Zander out by bringing gifts and doing some cleaning for a guardian statue in the Shannoa Forest
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Mystery Medicine Sidequest
achievements.description: Help find some flowers and leaves for Sara Stewart and bring them to her
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Milling the Wind Sidequest
achievements.description: Help Jonathan Lee prepare for repairing the windmill blades in Kylos by bringing him monster materials
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Daughter's Missing Gift Sidequest
achievements.description: Help Wes Herbst find the earrings his daughter gave him
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Forest Guardian: Part 2 Sidequest
achievements.description: Help Carol Zander again by bringing more gifts to the guardian statue and doing some repairs
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Finding Pikkards Sidequest
achievements.description: Search far and wide for all of Zak McShane's missing Pikkards
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Lecture: Dragons of Altago Sidequest
achievements.description: Help find materials from the many sanctums of Altago for Matthe Torres
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Spirit Elixir Concoction Sidequest
achievements.description: Look for all of the materials to have Brandi Swenson synthesize the Spirit Elixirs
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Holy Flame of Segram Sidequest
achievements.description: Assist Wesley Irizarry by bringing some of the holy flame of Segram to Altago City
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Titano Hunt: Bal Kilios Sidequest
achievements.description: Defeat Bal Kilios in the Altago Plains: Outskirts
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Titano Hunt: Soldi Orm Sidequest
achievements.description: Defeat Soldi Orm at the Flame Shrine Outside and obtain Dogi's best EXTRA skill
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Titano Hunt: Mili Urdu Sidequest
achievements.description: Defeat Mili Urdu at the Segram Desert: Outskirts and obtain Geis' best EXTRA skill
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Swords Not From Random Chests
achievements.description: Craft every synthesizable sword in the game, not including Caliocerion
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Wall-Crushing Satisfaction Guaranteed
achievements.description: Craft every synthesizable gauntlet in the game, not including Serisent-Noa
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: This Quiver is Ready to De-Liver
achievements.description: Craft every synthesizable bow in the game, not including Obiscuta
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Ready to Fight In Ernst
achievements.description: Craft every synthesizable halberd in the game, not including Zeno-Ides
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Dual of the Blades
achievements.description: Craft every synthesizable dual blade in the game, not including Ram-Seyma
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Crux of Our Attacks
achievements.description: Craft every synthesizable hammer in the game, not including El-Arbazel
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Pick a God and Pray for Your Life
achievements.description: Craft every synthesizable rod in the game, not including Antecrysta
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Weapons Filled With Our Determination and Human Spirit
achievements.description: Craft every character's ultimate weapon
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: No U-Magnets Needed for This Gear
achievements.description: Craft every synthesizable armor
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Man Girls Dream of... Based on His Autobiographies
achievements.description: Get all of Adol's skills to level 1, allowing you to use them with any weapon
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Adol's One Sword Style: Bump System Strength Smash
achievements.description: Get all of Adol 's skills to level 5 or higher
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Don't Mess With Berhardt's Disciple
achievements.description: Get all of Dogi's skills to level 1, allowing you to use them with any weapon
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The McBain of All Your Foes
achievements.description: Get all of Dogi's skills to level 5 or higher
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Dishing Out the Royal Treatment
achievements.description: Get all of Aisha's skills to level 1, allowing you to use them with any weapon
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: More Skills Than Those of a Rehdan Priestess
achievements.description: Get all of Aisha's skills to level 5 or higher
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Abilities Besides His Talismans
achievements.description: Get all of Geis' skills to level 1, allowing you to use them with any weapon
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Power of a Dananian
achievements.description: Get all of Geis' skills to level 5 or higher
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: His True Name is Elk Popeil
achievements.description: Get all of Elk's skills to level 1, allowing you to use them with any weapon
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: The Abilities of a Cervidae
achievements.description: Get all of Elk's skills to level 5 or higher
achievements.author: WanderingHeiho

achievements.title: Getting Into the Swing of Things
